lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਤਨੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: antar ratan beechaare |
lines.english: The Gurmukh loves the Name of the Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੰਗਲ ਰਸਿ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਏ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har mangal ras rasan rasaae naanak naam pragaasaa |2|
lines.english: My tongue tastes the taste of the Lord's joyous song; O Nanak, the Naam shines forth brightly. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਿਆਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam piaare |
lines.english: Deep within, she contemplates the jewel of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰੇ ਅਗਿਆਨੁ ਅਧੇਰੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har naam piaare sabad nisataare agiaan adher gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Those who love the Lord's Name are emancipated through the Word of the Shabad. The darkness of ignorance is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨੁ ਪ੍ਰਚੰਡੁ ਬਲਿਆ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣੁ ਘਰ ਮੰਦਰ ਸੋਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: giaan prachandd baliaa ghatt chaanan ghar mandar sohaaeaa |
lines.english: Spiritual wisdom burns brilliantly, illuminating the heart; their homes and temples are embellished and blessed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਅਰਪਿ ਸੀਗਾਰ ਬਣਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਾਚੇ ਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: tan man arap seegaar banaae har prabh saache bhaaeaa |
lines.english: I have made my body and mind into adornments, and dedicated them to the True Lord God, pleasing Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਕਾਜੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har prabh kaaj rachaaeaa |
lines.english: The Lord God has arranged the marriage ceremony;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵੀਆਹਣਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh veeaahan aaeaa |
lines.english: He has come to marry the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਕਹੈ ਸੋਈ ਪਰੁ ਕੀਜੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਅੰਕਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jo prabh kahai soee par keejai naanak ank samaaeaa |3|
lines.english: Whatever God says, I gladly do. O Nanak, I have merged into the fiber of His Being. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਮਿਲਿ ਮੰਗਲ ਗਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਆਪਿ ਸਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa mil mangal gaae har jeeo aap savaaree |
lines.english: The humble Saints join together and sing the songs of joy; the Dear Lord Himself has adorned the soul-bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੀਆਹਣਿ ਆਇਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਸਾ ਧਨ ਕੰਤ ਪਿਆਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: veeaahan aaeaa guramukh har paaeaa saa dhan kant piaaree |
lines.english: He has come to marry the Gurmukh, who has found the Lord. That bride is very dear to her Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮੈ ਸਾਚਾ ਨਾ ਕਦੇ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੪॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh paaeaa mai saachaa naa kade marai na jaaee |4|1|3|
lines.english: O Nanak, I have found my True Lord God, who never dies, and is not born. ||4||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਿ ਨਰ ਗਣ ਗੰਧਰਬ ਮਿਲਿ ਆਏ ਅਪੂਰਬ ਜੰਞ ਬਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sur nar gan gandharab mil aae apoorab jany banaaee |
lines.english: The angels and mortal beings, the heavenly heralds and celestial singers, have come together and formed a wondrous wedding party.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਛੰਤ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘਰੁ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: raag soohee chhant mahalaa 4 ghar 3 |
lines.english: Raag Soohee, Chhant, Fourth Mehl, Third House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹੋ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਕੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: aavaho sant janahu gun gaavah govind kere raam |
lines.english: Come, humble Saints, and sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੀਐ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਜਹਿ ਸਬਦ ਘਨੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh mil raheeai ghar vaajeh sabad ghanere raam |
lines.english: Let us gather together as Gurmukh; within the home of our own heart, the Shabad vibrates and resonates.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦ ਘਨੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰੇ ਤੂ ਕਰਤਾ ਸਭ ਥਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sabad ghanere har prabh tere too karataa sabh thaaee |
lines.english: The many melodies of the Shabad are Yours, O Lord God; O Creator Lord, You are everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਜਪੀ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਸਾਚ ਸਬਦਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ahinis japee sadaa saalaahee saach sabad liv laaee |
lines.english: Day and night, I chant His Praises forever, lovingly focusing on the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਰਹੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਿਦ ਪੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: anadin sehaj rahai rang raataa raam naam rid poojaa |
lines.english: Night and day, I remain intuitively attuned to the Lord's Love; in my heart, I worship the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh ek pachhaanai avar na jaanai doojaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, as Gurmukh, I have realized the One Lord; I do not know any other. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh rav rahiaa so prabh antarajaamee raam |
lines.english: He is contained amongst all; He is God, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਵੈ ਰਵਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: gur sabad ravai rav rahiaa so prabh meraa suaamee raam |
lines.english: One who meditates and dwells upon God, through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, knows that God, my Lord and Master, is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਰਵਿਆ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: prabh meraa suaamee antarajaamee ghatt ghatt raviaa soee |
lines.english: God, my Lord and Master, is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts; He pervades and permeates each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਈਐ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramat sach paaeeai sehaj samaaeeai tis bin avar na koee |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, Truth is obtained, and then, one merges in celestial bliss. There is no other than Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਾ ਜੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵਾ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: sahaje gun gaavaa je prabh bhaavaa aape le milaae |
lines.english: I sing His Praises with intuitive ease. If it pleases God, He shall unite me with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਬਦੇ ਜਾਪੈ ਅਹਿਨਿਸਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਏ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak so prabh sabade jaapai ahinis naam dhiaae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Shabad, God is known; meditate on the Naam, day and night. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਮਤਾ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: antare haumai mamataa kaam krodh chaturaaee raam |
lines.english: Within him is egotism, self-conceit, sexual desire, anger and cleverness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਜਗੋ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਪਾਰਿ ਨ ਪਾਈ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: eihu jago dutar manamukh paar na paaee raam |
lines.english: This world is treacherous and impassable; the self-willed manmukh cannot cross over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਚਤੁਰਾਈ ਥਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਈ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: antar chaturaaee thaae na paaee birathaa janam gavaaeaa |
lines.english: Within him is cleverness; he is not approved, and his life is uselessly wasted and lost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਮ ਮਗਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਵੈ ਅੰਤਿ ਗਇਆ ਪਛੁਤਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jam mag dukh paavai chottaa khaavai ant geaa pachhutaaeaa |
lines.english: On the Path of Death, he suffers in pain, and must endure abuse; in the end, he departs regretfully.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕੋ ਬੇਲੀ ਨਾਹੀ ਪੁਤੁ ਕੁਟੰਬੁ ਸੁਤੁ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai ko belee naahee put kuttanb sut bhaaee |
lines.english: Without the Name, he has no friends, no children, family or relatives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਪਸਾਰਾ ਆਗੈ ਸਾਥਿ ਨ ਜਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak maaeaa mohu pasaaraa aagai saath na jaaee |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, the wealth of Maya, attachment and ostentatious shows - none of them shall go along with him to the world hereafter. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਪੂਛਉ ਅਪਨਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਦਾਤਾ ਕਿਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਦੁਤਰੁ ਤਰੀਐ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: hau poochhau apanaa satigur daataa kin bidh dutar tareeai raam |
lines.english: I ask my True Guru, the Giver, how to cross over the treacherous and difficult world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ਚਲਹੁ ਜੀਵਤਿਆ ਇਵ ਮਰੀਐ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bhaae chalahu jeevatiaa iv mareeai raam |
lines.english: Walk in harmony with the True Guru's Will, and remain dead while yet alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤਿਆ ਮਰੀਐ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਤਰੀਐ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jeevatiaa mareeai bhaujal tareeai guramukh naam samaavai |
lines.english: Remaining dead while yet alive, cross over the terrifying world-ocean; as Gurmukh, merge in the Naam.
